description: You are a biomedical engineer at University Hospital preparing to deploy OpenICE's closed-loop drug infusion safety system in the cardiac ICU. Create simulated device adapters for a physiological monitor providing SpO2 readings and a controllable infusion pump. Launch the clinical application for medication infusion safety monitoring and configure the SpO2-based safety interlock threshold. Verify that both devices are communicating with the safety application and that the interlock configuration is active. Write a technical configuration report to /home/ga/Desktop/infusion_safety_config.txt documenting the specific device types created for each role, the SpO2 threshold value configured, and a description of the expected system behavior when a patient's SpO2 drops below that threshold. OpenICE Supervisor is already running on the desktop.

metadata.clinical_context: Closed-loop medication safety interlock for ICU
